info.title: Bike Rental API
info.description: REST API for the Bike Rental management system

tags.name: Equipment Statuses
tags.description: Equipment status catalog and allowed transitions

put.description: Replaces all fields of an existing equipment record
Updates name, description and allowed transitions for a status
Replaces all fields of an existing customer profile

409.description: Phone number already used by another customer

post.summary: Calculate rental cost for multiple equipment items
post.description: Supports normal mode (auto-select tariffs, apply discount) and SPECIAL mode (fixed group price)

404.description: No suitable tariff found for an equipment type

get.description: Returns a paginated list of rentals filtered by status, customer or equipment UID

post.description: Creates an active rental in one step with all required data
Completes a rental by returning the rented equipment, calculates final cost and records additional payment if needed

400.description: Validation error or rental identifier missing

422.description: Rental not in active state or insufficient prepayment

post.description: Creates an empty rental draft to be filled step by step

post.summary: Record a fund withdrawal for a customer
Record a fund deposit for a customer
Apply a manual balance adjustment to a customer wallet

get.description: Returns paginated equipment list filtered by status and/or type

post.description: Registers a new piece of equipment in the catalog

get.description: Returns all statuses with their allowed transitions
Returns customers whose phone number contains the given digit sequence

patch.description: Applies partial updates to a rental. Supported paths: /customerId, /equipmentIds, /duration, /status. Setting status=ACTIVE activates the rental.

422.description: Invalid rental status transition or equipment not available

get.summary: Select cheapest V2 tariff for equipment type and duration. For debug purpose
Get all pricing types with localized title and description
Get active V2 tariffs by equipment type
Retrieve paginated transaction history for a customer

PricingParams.description: Pricing-type-specific parameters (only fields relevant to the tariff's pricing type are populated)

TariffV2Request.description: Request body for creating or updating a V2 tariff

EquipmentRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating equipment

commissionedAt.description: Date when equipment was put into service

EquipmentTypeUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating an equipment type

EquipmentStatusUpdateRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating an equipment status

allowedTransitions.description: Set of status slugs this status can transition to
Status slugs this status can transition to

CustomerRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating a customer profile

birthDate.description: Date of birth (must be in the past)

EquipmentItemRequest.description: Single equipment item for cost calculation

CreateRentalRequest.description: Request body for creating a rental via Fast Path

equipmentIds.description: List of Equipment IDs to rent (preferred)

tariffId.description: Optional tariff ID; auto-selected if not provided

specialTariffId.description: ID of a SPECIAL-type V2 tariff; mutually exclusive with discountPercent

specialPrice.description: Operator-provided fixed total; required when specialTariffId is set

discountPercent.description: Discount percentage applied to the non-special subtotal (0-100); ignored when specialTariffId is set

equipmentItems.description: List of equipment items in this rental

actualReturnAt.description: Actual return time (null if not returned)

actualDurationMinutes.description: Actual duration in minutes (null until returned)

ReturnEquipmentRequest.description: Request body for returning rented equipment

equipmentIds.description: List of equipment IDs to return

equipmentUids.description: List of equipment UIDs to return

paymentMethod.description: Payment method for any additional charge

settlement.description: Settlement transaction related to rental return

SettlementResponse.description: Settlement response containing capture transaction references, optional release transaction reference and the timestamp when the settlement was recorded

releaseTransactionRef.description: Release transaction reference (UUID). Present when a release transaction was created.

recordedAt.description: Timestamp when the settlement was recorded

RecordWithdrawalRequest.description: Request body for recording a fund withdrawal

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID sent with every request to ensure exactly-once submission

TransactionResponse.description: Unified transaction response for deposits and adjustments

recordedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was recorded

RecordDepositRequest.description: Request body for recording a fund deposit

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID sent with every request to ensure exactly-once submission

EquipmentTypeRequest.description: Request body for creating an equipment type

EquipmentStatusRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating an equipment status

allowedTransitions.description: Set of status slugs this status can transition to

TariffSelectionV2Response.description: Selected V2 tariff with cost for the given duration

PricingTypeResponse.description: Pricing type with localized title and description

RentalSummaryResponse.description: Compact rental summary for list views

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent ledger mutation (UTC ISO-8601)

CustomerSearchResponse.description: Compact customer info returned in search results
